# Jane Riveros

> AI program manager who builds her own agents. 15+ years of enterprise program, risk, and resilience leadership in regulated financial services (Wells Fargo, Bank of America, EY, Accenture; U.S. Army veteran — two Iraq deployments), now building governed agentic AI systems from Santiago, Chile. U.S. and Chilean citizen, open to U.S.-based and international remote roles.

Official site: https://janeriveros.com

## Who she is

- Executive program leader: enterprise transformation, regulatory change, operational resilience, PMO and execution governance in financial services.
- Hands-on AI builder: designs, ships, and operates her own agents rather than only managing AI programs.
- Founder of Novaxis Advisory.
- Credentials: MBA (Florida International University), DBA in Strategy and Innovation in progress (Capella University), PMP, CSM, Lean Six Sigma Black Belt.
- Bilingual English/Spanish.

## What she has built

- MAVIS: production conversational operations agent, live on Telegram and Slack — persistent cross-conversation memory, email and calendar integration, file creation, image understanding, and agent-to-agent handoffs. Also embedded as the live voice + text agent on this website.
- Victoria: a governed team agent that operates inside company Slack channels — joins conversations, posts and updates team work status, asks team members questions, and answers Jane directly, with every channel permission-scoped. Built to augment how company teams work, with governance gates built in.
- Agent fleet: ATLAS and VICTORIA — research and multi-agent testing systems with governance gates between sandbox and production, orchestrated by NOVAXIS OS.
- This website (janeriveros.com): multilingual (5 languages), optimized for AI search, with the MAVIS voice + text agent embedded. Designed, built, and deployed by Jane — proof of the work, not just a description of it.

## Site map

- https://janeriveros.com/ — home
- https://janeriveros.com/work — system architecture and the live build / fleet status board
- https://janeriveros.com/flywheel — building in public

## Why it matters

She applies the discipline of regulated delivery — controls, audit trails, accountability, permission-scoped governance — to agentic AI. The combination of senior enterprise program leadership and hands-on agent engineering is rare. Her differentiator is governed agents that augment company teams, built the way regulated financial-services programs are delivered.
